Meritocracy's just myth; promotions still echo old-world chap favoritism.
Even in libraries we're boxed into old-timey archetypes - as if sorting books all day isn't challenging enough!

readability.explanation: The adapted text is almost as readable and understandable as the original text. Some minor changes in wording and phrasing may make it slightly less clear, but overall it is still easy to understand.

meaning.explanation: The adapted text conveys the same message and meaning as the original text. It maintains the same tone, style, and content, with only minor changes that do not affect the overall meaning.

hallucinations.explanation: The adapted text does not contain any new information that was not present in the original text. It correctly abstracts and generalizes the original text, with no signs of hallucination.
